case_title: ROGER ASHKENAZI VS. ANTHONY (TONY) MOATTAR et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASHKENAZI, ROGER

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFAULT PROVE UP IN SCD. HEARING SET FOR FEB-26-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-25-2004 CONTINUED TO APR-21-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. FEB-25-2004 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PROVE-UP HEARING HELD FROM UNCONTESTED CALENDAR IN D-622 ON THURS., 26FEB2004, 9:00AM; RAYMOND BURKE, ESQ. APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF ROGER ASHKENAZI WHO IS ALSO PRESENT; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR DEFENDANT ANTHONY (TONY) MOATTAR; THE COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT ENTERED IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT ANTHONY (TONY) MOATTAR IN THE AMOUNT OF $21,000.00 FOR DAMAGES AND $700.00 INTEREST AND FOR $183.00 COSTS FOR A TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $21,883.00; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. JUDGE: HON. J. AUGUSTUS ACCURSO; REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-622, THURS., 26FEB2004).
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-31-2003 CONTINUED TO FEB-25-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. DEC-31-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASHKENAZI, ROGER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOATTAR, ANTHONY (TONY) $21,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $700.00 INTEREST, $183.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,883.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
